calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Continued To Jun-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Declaration Of Laura Portillo In Support Of Application For Entry Of Default Judgment And Award Of Attorneys Fees Upon Defendants Default
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request of default judgment against Defendant Garteiser Honea, PLLC; a Texas Professional Limited Liability Company and Defendant Garteiser Honea Law Corporation, A California Corporation

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43:05 a.m., pausing at 9:56:07 a.m., resuming at 9:57:06 a.m. and concluding at 9:58:42 a.m.(D505)

Laura Portillo, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff U.S Legal Support, Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Garteiser Honea, PLLC; a Texas Professional Limited Liability Company and Defendant Garteiser Honea Law Corporation, A California Corporation not appearing.
Witness Carrie Ward sworn to testify for Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, et al filed on April 12, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Garteiser Honea, PLLC; a Texas Professional Limited Liability Company served May 24, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Garteiser Honea Law Corporation, A California Corporation served May 24, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendants Garteiser Honea, PLLC; a Texas Professional Limited Liability Company and Garteiser Honea Law Corporation, A California Corporation on July 20, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendants Michael Scott Fuller, an individual and Does 1 through 20, inclusive on January 4, 2024.

Counsel to provide a brief summary of the causes of action and an offer of proof as to witness testimony.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Invoices.
Exhibit B: Interest Calculation.
Exhibit D: Data/Calculate Interest.
Plaintiff calls the witness to testify.
Witness confirms that declarations made, and exhibits submitted are true and correct.

Upon totality of the evidence, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against defendants as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants the following:

Damages $58,707.33
Interest $25,794.62
Attorney's Fees $5,490.00
Costs $1,063.31

Total Judgment $91,055.26

Proposed judgment to be submitted by counsel for the Court's approval and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
